messages.message: It's Leon over at Core Dispatch. We make sure missed calls still get answered. How are you handling calls when you're out on a job right now?
Honestly? Half of them just go to voicemail and never call back.
Yeah, that's the exact thing we fix. How much is a new customer usually worth to you?
A good job is a couple hundred bucks easy. How much does this cost?
A hundred forty nine a month, no contract. Want me to get you set up?
Yeah let's do it. Can you call me back tomorrow morning to walk through it?
